args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-10613473111225866876']
reviews = locals()['var_function-call-2378795112404693238']

df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rev = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
df_rev['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_rev['rating'])

# Calculate average rating
avg_ratings = df_rev.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
avg_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'average_rating'}, inplace=True)

# Merge
df_merged = pd.merge(df_bus, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
df_sorted = df_merged.sort_values(by='average_rating', ascending=False)

# Top 5
top_5 = df_sorted.head(5)

result = top_5[['name', 'average_rating']].to_dict(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result))

import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-10613473111225866876']
reviews = locals()['var_function-call-2378795112404693238']

df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rev = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
df_rev['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_rev['rating'])

# Calculate average rating
avg_ratings = df_rev.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
avg_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'average_rating'}, inplace=True)

# Merge
df_merged = pd.merge(df_bus, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
df_sorted = df_merged.sort_values(by='average_rating', ascending=False)

# Top 5
top_5 = df_sorted.head(5)

result = top_5[['name', 'average_rating']].to_dict(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result))
